heading: Department and Agency officials
label: 321c Department and Agency officials
notes: Amendments2018—Subsecs. (b), (c). redesignated subsec. (c) as (b) and struck out former subsec. (b). Prior to amendment, text of subsec. (b) read as follows: “There is in the Department an Assistant Secretary for Cybersecurity and Communications.”Pub. L. 115–278
Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Mar. 31, 2007section 614(b)(3) of Pub. L. 109–295section 701 of this title
amendments: Amendments2018—Subsecs. (b), (c). redesignated subsec. (c) as (b) and struck out former subsec. (b). Prior to amendment, text of subsec. (b) read as follows: “There is in the Department an Assistant Secretary for Cybersecurity and Communications.”Pub. L. 115–278

children.heading: Deputy Administrators
children.label: a Deputy Administrators
children.text: The President may appoint, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate, not more than 4 Deputy Administrators to assist the Administrator in carrying out this subchapter.

children.heading: United States Fire Administration
children.label: b United States Fire Administration
children.text: The Administrator of the United States Fire Administration shall have a rank equivalent to an assistant secretary of the Department.
